name: --gradient-bg
value: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff008355 25%, transparent 25%) -10px 0/ 20px 20px, linear-gradient(225deg, #ff0083 25%, transparent 25%) -10px 0/ 20px 20px, linear-gradient(315deg, #ff008355 25%, transparent 25%) 0px 0/ 20px 20px, linear-gradient(45deg, #ff0083 25%, #e5e5f7 25%) 0px 0/ 20px 20px

name: --iti-selected-country-arrow-padding
value: calc(var(--iti-arrow-padding) + var(--iti-arrow-padding) + var(--iti-flag-width) + var(--iti-spacer-horizontal) + var(--iti-arrow-width) + var(--iti-input-padding))
